title: omphalium vernum
intro: Omphalium vernum, also known as Winter Cress or Land Cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Omphalium vernum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves, stems, and roots of the plant.
